lastReleaseMessage: library: grid-auto-rows:150px so tiles can't collapse short; tile fills cell at 100%/100%; container 480px tall for three rows; images stop overflowing into the next row

barRaise.topFinding: The six-day stall broke: v0.15.9 through v0.15.12 all shipped 2026-06-01, and the untracked-report pile got swept into the v0.15.9 release commit, so git status is clean again. The product side is healthy and moving. The cost of resuming is that the loaded gun from the last five reports finally fired: those four releases each ran scripts/write-dashboard-status.ps1, which rebuilds the whole payload and hardcodes barRaise to all-null and audit.findings to 0/0/0, so YaA.json now shows a null verdict and false 0/0/0 findings on the public status dashboard. Two HIGH findings stand (the dashboard clobber, now fired, and the 47 em-dashes still shipping in all six public Markdown/HTML files), setting the verdict to at-risk. Both live in the meta and docs perimeter, not the running label engine, but the dashboard now actively lies about this project until the next bar-raise or a read-merge-write fix lands.
